title: Harishankar Temple
tagline: Harishankar Temple — spiritual town of Odisha

overview.short: Sri Sri Harisankar Devasthana is a temple on the slopes of Gandhamardhan hills, Bolangir District of Odisha in India.
overview.description: Sri Sri Harisankar Devasthana is a temple on the slopes of Gandhamardhan hills, Bolangir District of Odisha in India. It is popular for its scenes of nature and connection to two Hindu lords, Vishnu and Shiva. As a holy place, along with a stream passing on the granite bed, it has given some visitors a feeling of peace. On the opposite of side of the Gandhamardhan hills is the temple of Nrusinghanath.

topPlaces.name: Gandhamardan Hills
topPlaces.description: Gandhamardan Hills or Gandhamardan Parbat 1060m(Odia: ଗନ୍ଧମାର୍ଦନ ପର୍ବତ) is a hill located in between Balangir and Bargarh district of Odisha, India. This hill is well known for medicinal plants.

topPlaces.name: Paikmal
topPlaces.description: Paikmal is a town and Block Head Quarter in Bargarh district of Odisha state in eastern India. The location is famous for Nrusinghanath Temple.

items.note: Gandhamardan Hills or Gandhamardan Parbat 1060m(Odia: ଗନ୍ଧମାର୍ଦନ ପର୍ବତ) is a hill located in between Balangir and Bargarh district of Odisha, India. This hill is well known for medicinal plants.
Paikmal is a town and Block Head Quarter in Bargarh district of Odisha state in eastern India. The location is famous for Nrusinghanath Temple.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Harishankar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Harishankar Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Harishankar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Swami Vivekananda Airport, Raipur (122 km) and the nearest railway station is Sambalpur Junction (134 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Harishankar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Harishankar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Harishankar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Harishankar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Harishankar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gandhamardan Hills, Paikmal.
